subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been received.  Do thou thy utmost to show Jalalu’d-Dawlih and other Iranian refugees maximum consideration and kindness… The aim of the Baha’ís is to raise aloft the banner of the world’s Great Peace, to eradicate the foundations of war
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید در حق جلال الدوله و سائر آواره گان ایران بقدر مقدور نهایت رعایت
subcodes.subjects: @constitutional revolution in Iran, @universal peace; world unity, @non-participation in politics
